meta.ministry: Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions, Department of Administrative Reforms and Public Grievances
meta.project_subject: Work Order for extension of SCDPM PMU from 01.04.2024 to 30.09.2024
meta.deliverables: Monitoring of the progress on SCDPM Portal; Data Analytics of the data received on SCDPM Portal; Drafting Agenda for Monthly Review Meetings of all Ministries/Departments by DARPG; Preparation of Presentations or reports on the update and progress of the Ministries/Departments on SCDPM; Analysis of Best practices from Ministries/Departments on Monthly basis; Preparation of monthly report of Secretariat Reforms on the basis of monthly data on SCDPM Portal; Any other work assigned by the DARPG

content.full_text: The Department of Administrative Reforms and Public Grievances (DARPG) under the Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions has issued a work order to Quality Council of India (QCI) for extension of the SCDPM PMU from 01.04.2024 to 30.09.2024. The scope includes monitoring progress on SCDPM Portal, data analytics, drafting agenda for monthly review meetings, preparing presentations/reports, analyzing best practices, and preparing monthly reports on Secretariat Reforms. The PMU team will comprise 3 QCI professionals working for 6 months. The total cost is Rs 30,24,000 plus applicable GST, with payment structured as 25% on commencement, 25% after 3 months, and 50% after 6 months. The department may discontinue services if not satisfactory.
